shops.name: ABC Mart Grand Stage
shops.description:
ABC Mart Grand Stage is a multi-brand sneaker destination carrying the latest releases from Nike, New Balance, Converse, and Vans. The Saigon Centre flagship stocks limited-edition colourways available nowhere else in Vietnam.

The in-store fitting lounge lets customers test shoes on a short indoor track before purchasing. Staff are trained sneaker specialists who can recommend the right silhouette for every occasion.

shops.name: adidas
shops.description:
adidas Saigon Centre is a full-category brand store featuring performance running, training, football, and Originals lifestyle collections. Seasonal drops land here on global launch day.

The store offers complimentary gait analysis and a personalisation bar where customers can add embroidery or heat-press graphics to selected footwear and apparel.

shops.name: ALDO
shops.description:
ALDO brings trend-forward footwear and accessories from Montreal to Ho Chi Minh City. The collection spans heels, flats, loafers, and bags refreshed every six weeks to match global runway trends.

The store carries the ALDO x Barbie collaboration and eco-friendly Love Planet line made from recycled materials. Gift wrapping is complimentary year-round.

shops.name: Armani Exchange
shops.description:
Armani Exchange offers the youthful, streetwear-influenced side of the Giorgio Armani universe. Expect bold logo tees, clean-cut denim, and structured outerwear at an accessible price point.

The Saigon Centre boutique carries both men's and women's ready-to-wear alongside a curated watch and eyewear wall.

shops.name: Calvin Klein
shops.description:
Calvin Klein Saigon Centre is a lifestyle store showcasing the brand's signature minimalist aesthetic across apparel, underwear, and denim. The space is designed with clean concrete finishes and gallery-style lighting.

Seasonal campaigns launch in-store with exclusive gift-with-purchase offers. The CK Jeans denim bar carries fits from skinny to relaxed in a full size run.

shops.name: Charles & Keith
shops.description:
Charles & Keith is a Singapore-born label known for modern footwear, bags, and accessories. The Saigon Centre store is one of the largest in Vietnam, carrying the full women's and kids' range.

New arrivals drop bi-weekly, and the store hosts styling workshops every quarter with local fashion influencers.

shops.name: ASICS
shops.description:
ASICS Saigon Centre is a performance running specialist. The store features a foot-scanning station that maps arch type and pronation to recommend the ideal Gel-Kayano, Gel-Nimbus, or Novablast model.

Staff include certified running coaches who lead a free 5K club departing from the store every Saturday at 6 AM.

shops.name: Birkenstock
shops.description:
Birkenstock Saigon Centre stocks the full sandal range from Arizona and Boston classics to seasonal collaborations. The cork footbed fitting service ensures every pair moulds perfectly to the wearer.

The store also carries the 1774 premium line and a growing selection of closed-toe shoes and sneakers.

shops.name: L'Usine
shops.description:
L'Usine is a Saigon institution blending specialty coffee, all-day brunch, and a curated retail concept under one roof. The Saigon Centre outpost features an open kitchen and a rooftop terrace.

The menu balances Vietnamese favourites with Western comfort food. Single-origin pour-overs are sourced from farms in Da Lat and roasted in-house weekly.

shops.name: Starbucks
shops.description:
The Starbucks Reserve at Saigon Centre is a premium experience store offering small-lot Reserve coffees brewed via Clover, siphon, and pour-over alongside the classic espresso menu.

Seating wraps around a central bar, creating a theatre-style brewing experience. The Vietnam-exclusive ca phe sua da Frappuccino is a perennial bestseller.

shops.name: Basta Hiro
shops.description:
Basta Hiro is an Italian-Japanese fusion restaurant. Handmade pasta meets Japanese precision in dishes like truffle udon carbonara and miso bolognese with house-pulled noodles.

The open kitchen seats eight at a chef's counter, and the main dining room accommodates 60. Lunch sets start at VND 189,000.

shops.name: Beard Papa's
shops.description:
Beard Papa's serves Japan's iconic cream puffs -- crispy choux shells filled to order with vanilla, chocolate, matcha, or seasonal custard. Every puff is baked fresh in-store throughout the day.

The Saigon Centre kiosk also offers soft-serve ice cream and a rotating monthly special flavour.

shops.name: Boat Noodle
shops.description:
Boat Noodle serves authentic Thai street-style noodles in small bowls meant for stacking. The signature pork and beef boat noodles come in rich herbal broth simmered for hours.

Side dishes include crispy pork belly, papaya salad, and Thai milk tea. Prices start at VND 29,000 per bowl.

shops.name: BreadTalk
shops.description:
BreadTalk is a Singapore-based bakery chain famous for its Flosss bun and creative Asian-inspired breads. The open-concept bakery lets customers watch bakers at work throughout the day.

The Saigon Centre outlet also carries cakes, pastries, and a seasonal mooncake collection during Mid-Autumn Festival.

shops.name: Chateraise
shops.description:
Chateraise is a Japanese patisserie and sweets shop offering cakes, ice cream, and confections at remarkably affordable prices. Ingredients are sourced from Chateraise's own farms in Yamanashi.

Best sellers include the double cream puff, strawberry shortcake, and matcha roll cake. A grab-and-go frozen dessert section makes gifting easy.

shops.name: Bose
shops.description:
Bose Saigon Centre is an experience store where every headphone, speaker, and soundbar can be auditioned in acoustically tuned demo rooms. Staff provide personalised sound profiles using the Bose app.

The store stocks the full consumer range including QuietComfort Ultra earbuds, Portable Home Speaker, and the Smart Soundbar 900.

shops.name: Beauty Box
shops.description:
Beauty Box is Vietnam's leading multi-brand beauty retailer, stocking skincare, makeup, haircare, and fragrance from over 100 Korean, Japanese, and Western brands.

The store offers free skin consultations with a handheld analyser and runs monthly brand pop-ups with exclusive samples and gifts with purchase.

shops.name: Chanel
shops.description:
The Chanel Beauty boutique at Saigon Centre showcases the full fragrance, skincare, and makeup universe of the Maison. The space is designed with Chanel's signature black-and-white palette.

Complimentary makeup touch-ups and fragrance consultations are available daily. The Les Exclusifs de Chanel collection of rare fragrances is available for private discovery sessions.

shops.name: Hublot
shops.description:
Hublot's Saigon Centre boutique is an authorised dealer for the Swiss luxury watchmaker. The Big Bang, Classic Fusion, and Spirit of Big Bang collections are on permanent display.

Private viewing appointments can be arranged for high-complication and limited-edition pieces. After-sales servicing is handled on-site by a certified Hublot watchmaker.

shops.name: Annam Gourmet
shops.description:
Annam Gourmet is a premium European-style grocery and deli stocking imported cheeses, charcuterie, wines, and organic produce alongside Vietnamese artisan products.

The in-store deli counter serves made-to-order sandwiches, salads, and fresh juices. Weekly wine tastings are held every Friday evening with rotating guest sommeliers.
